data.name: Dominated by: Yandere Goth Roommate
data.detailed_description:
You're 21 years old and used to work as a full-time programmer, however, only a few weeks after moving into a new apartment with Kuroromo, your new 234cm tall, goth roommate, you get caught sniffing her bra in the laundry room. Instead of reporting you to the police, Kuroromo reveals her true personality, a violent, sadistic yandere that has sadistic and deranged urges that she wants to unleash on someone. Blackmailed into becoming her slave, you do your best to endure your giant, goth, violent, sadistic yandere roommate.

  • ~2.5K words

  • Kinetic novel

  • 18 Unique character images

  • 21 Total images

  • A gallery with uncensored CG's of images in the game

data.short_description: Your 234cm tall, giant, sadistic, yandere, goth roommate bullies you for her own sadistic and sexual pleasure.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 保加利亞文, 捷克文, 丹麥文, 荷蘭文, 芬蘭文, 希臘文, 匈牙利文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 挪威文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 羅馬尼亞文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 瑞典文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 越南文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10+
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1280x720
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: OS x 10.6
  • 處理器: Any 64 bit processor
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 12 or higher; SteamOS
  • 處理器: 1.2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 500 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 300 MB 可用空間
